prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image features a man sitting on the floor in front of a large mirror. He is taking a picture of himself using his cell phone, capturing both his reflection and the surrounding area. In addition to the man, there are two other people present in the room, one standing near the left side of the frame and another person closer to the right edge.

The room has various items scattered around it. There's an umbrella placed towards the center-left part of the space, while a handbag can be seen resting nearby. Two bottles are also located within the room – one close to the top-right corner and the other at the bottom-right corner. Furthermore, a chair is situated against the wall, providing seating options for those who may want to relax or engage with others in the room.

sparc.free_caption:

He is taking a picture with his cell phone while looking at himself in the mirror. There are two other people present in the background, one standing closer to the left side of the frame and another person further back towards the right side.
